name: Mood Playlists
author: Craig Lusher
description: Audio analysis-powered mood playlists and Instant Mix. Creates 13 mood playlists (Happy, Chill, Energetic, Melancholy, Party, Aggressive, Study, Workout, Sleep, Road Trip, Cooking, Dining, Background) using an external analyzer service.

analyzer_url.title: Analyzer Service URL
analyzer_url.description: URL of the mood analyzer HTTP service (e.g., http://music-manager:5000)

auto_analyze.title: Auto-Analyze New Tracks
auto_analyze.description: Automatically analyze new tracks on a schedule

analyze_schedule.title: Analysis Schedule (cron)
analyze_schedule.description: Cron expression for when to scan for and analyze new tracks

playlist_refresh_schedule.title: Playlist Refresh Schedule (cron)
playlist_refresh_schedule.description: Cron expression for when to refresh mood playlists

playlist_track_count.title: Tracks per Playlist
playlist_track_count.description: Number of tracks in each mood playlist

similar_songs_count.title: Similar Songs Count
similar_songs_count.description: Number of similar songs to return for Instant Mix

happy_threshold.title: Happy Threshold
happy_threshold.description: Minimum score (0-1) for happy mood classification

chill_threshold.title: Chill Threshold
chill_threshold.description: Minimum score (0-1) for chill/relaxed mood classification

party_threshold.title: Party Threshold
party_threshold.description: Minimum score (0-1) for party mood classification

melancholy_threshold.title: Melancholy Threshold
melancholy_threshold.description: Minimum score (0-1) for sad/melancholy mood classification

aggressive_threshold.title: Aggressive Threshold
aggressive_threshold.description: Minimum score (0-1) for aggressive mood classification

http.reason: Call the mood analyzer service for audio analysis

library.reason: Read track metadata and file paths for analysis

scheduler.reason: Schedule periodic analysis and playlist refresh tasks

taskqueue.reason: Process audio analysis in background batches

kvstore.reason: Store mood analysis scores for each track

config.reason: Read user-configured thresholds and service URLs
